metadata.title: Lê Xuân Thành | Enterprise Frontend Engineer
metadata.description: Frontend Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience engineering secure, scalable web applications using React, TypeScript, and modern UI frameworks.

profile.name: Lê Xuân Thành - Frontend Engineer
profile.subtext: Frontend Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience engineering secure, scalable web applications using React, TypeScript, and modern UI frameworks.

philosophy.title: Philosophy
clauses: I believe in creating modular front-end architecture where strict logic meets human intuition.
By bridging the absolute precision of TypeScript with scalable, standard design systems,
we transform high-volume data tables and intricate workflows into seamless digital journeys.

core.title: Enterprise React Architecture
core.description:
TypeScript • React • Zustand • React Query • Redux Toolkit.

Architecting high-performance single-page apps capable of handling complex data flows.

motion.title: Optimization
motion.description:
• API Overhead: -40%
• Dashboard Load: -1s
• UX: Optimized for high concurrent user loads.

system.title: UI Component Engineering
system.description:
Ant Design • Tailwind CSS • Material UI.

Standardizing robust, reusable UI libraries to slash dev time.

tooling.title: Workflow & DevOps
tooling.description:
GitFlow • Code Review • Agile • IIS Server Deployment.

Ensuring code quality from commit to on-premise production.

creative.title: Mission-Critical Integrations
creative.description:

Engineering secure permission layers and approval workflows.
